response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web, backend, and DLang experience, but the role demands deep JVM expertise, specifically Java, Kotlin, Spring, and IDE internals. Java appears only as a minor skill listed alongside many others, with no evidence of Kotlin, Spring, Hibernate, or Quarkus work, and no IDE/language-tooling experience beyond brief C/C++ contributions to LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. The mismatch with the core required qualifications is significant.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems across multiple companies
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, testability, pairing
Prior C/C++ IDE contribution at National Instruments shows some tooling exposure
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only superficial Java listed as a skill
No Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or application server experience shown
No recent IDE internals or JVM language-tooling work

key_factors.factor: Lack of Kotlin and deep Java/JVM expertise
No Spring or enterprise framework experience
Prior IDE/tooling work at National Instruments
